name: MojoAuth
description: Start passwordless email authentication by sending a MojoAuth magic link.

auth.hint: Create a MojoAuth project API key and send it in the x-api-key header.

tools.name: send_magic_link
tools.description: Send a passwordless authentication magic link to an email address.

params.name: language
params.description: Preferred communication language; the implementation guide documents en as the default.
